title.en: Ye Tian said with a sigh.

content.en:
"I've improved so much!"

Ye Tian ended the retreat, sensed his current strength, and couldn't help but exclaim.

After cultivating the Void Body Alchemy Technique, the Soul Shattering Refining Technique, and the Ten Thousand Stacks Origin Technique, his current physical strength, True Ancestor power, and soul power are several times that of before, which can be said to be an earth-shaking transformation!

In addition, the three major Thousand Dao Techniques, namely the Selfless Vacuum, the Ten Thousand True Spear, and the Tiangang Forbidden Technique, have also been cultivated to the consummation realm, and the Great Wilderness Law Body is gradually approaching the extreme realm.

In addition, Ye Tian's supreme sword path has progressed too fast, as if there is no restraint, he is making rapid progress, and now he has mastered half of the supreme sword dao.

The Xeon Wind Dao and the Xeon Life Dao had also made great progress, but since Ye Tian had not fully comprehended and cultivated them, they could not be compared to the Xeon Sword Dao.

Generally speaking, Ye Tian's current strength is much stronger than in the past, and it is also ten or even dozens of times stronger than when he was just promoted to Supreme True Ancestor.

"With my current strength, the Invincible True Ancestor can't stop my move at all. Even if it is an invincible True Ancestor with a strong ability to save his life, it won't take a few moves to kill him!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

According to his own estimates, his current strength should be equivalent to that of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is also a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor at the top level.

What's more, he is still far from reaching the limit of the Supreme True Ancestor, once he cultivates to the limit of the Supreme True Ancestor, maybe his combat power is comparable to that of the Four Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

It is conceivable that once he steps into the realm of Dao Ancestor, his combat power will leap to what level.

"Supreme True Ancestor is terrifying, Invincible True Ancestor is like a baby to Supreme True Ancestor! I must let my wife, sister, and children all be promoted to Supreme True Ancestor, and no matter how big the price is, I have to promote them!" Ye Tian muttered.

Other True Ancestors are not qualified to impact the Supreme True Ancestor, but his children, wife, and sister have already broken the shackles of living beings in the underworld with the help of the Heavenly Forbidden Technique Heart or the Heavenly Forbidden Fruit, as long as they impact the Invincible True Ancestor to the extreme, and then make a slight breakthrough to enter the Supreme True Ancestor's combat power.

So, they are still very promising.

"There are still two Heavenly Forbidden Tree Hearts left, what should I do with them?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Suddenly, he thought of Ouyang Jiu'er.

Ouyang Jiu'er was indeed very good to him, the relationship between the two was very good, and the last time the Void Heaven True Country was invaded, if it wasn't for Ouyang Jiu'er's action, his wife Xiao Yue would be in danger.

Therefore, Ouyang Jiu'er can be said to have a life-saving grace for Xiao Yue.

Moreover, Ouyang Jiu'er took him into the treasure land many times, which made him gain a lot, and it was right for him to give Ouyang Jiu'er a copy of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart.

Thereupon.

He asked Ouyang Jiu'er to meet, and the two soon met.

"Brother Ye, what are you looking for me?"

Ouyang Jiu'er asked.

"This is for you!" Ye Tian handed a piece of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart to Ouyang Jiu'er.

"Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart!" Ouyang Jiu'er recognized it at a glance, and said in shock: "Where did you get the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, this thing is extremely rare!"

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and told him about the discovery of a forbidden treasure land.

"How do you know that the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree has this effect, this is also an incomparably secret secret in the Divine Heaven Realm, if it weren't for my elders being very strong, I wouldn't know this secret!" Ouyang Jiu'er was surprised.

He felt that none of the ten kings of Black Wind Mountain would necessarily know such a secret, and Ye Tian should not have a chance to obtain such a secret!

"I happened to know it from an ancient book!" Ye Tian said casually.

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't get to the bottom of it, but said: "Your choice is very good, although the Heavenly Forbidden Tree has the hope of growing into a Forbidden Divine Tree, even if it is not cultivated, it will take ten trillion years to give birth to a Heavenly Forbidden Fruit, but after all, it will take a long time, and it is easy to change in the middle, so digging out the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart is a normal choice! But you really want to give me this Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, do you know what this Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart can be exchanged for?"

"I know that the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart is very precious, but you have also helped me a lot, and it is also appropriate to give it to you!"

Ye Tian didn't care.

Ouyang Jiu'er was very moved, and pinched the heart of this Heavenly Forbidden Tree, and her heart was very entangled.

Once, she also wanted to find a piece of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart or the Heavenly Forbidden Fruit, but unfortunately she couldn't find it, don't look at the level of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree is not very high, but its value is more precious than the Forbidden Treasure.

Among the forbidden treasures, the Forbidden Tree can be called the first.

After all, the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart and the Heavenly Forbidden Fruit can give people the opportunity to step into the Supreme True Ancestor, for a True Ancestor or a force, they would rather give up the Forbidden Treasure than compete for the Heavenly Forbidden Tree.

A Heavenly Forbidden Tree was once born in the Divine Heaven Realm, and as a result, a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible True Ancestors were killed, and the fallen Supreme Dao Ancestors were far from one or two.

It is conceivable that once the news of the birth of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is leaked, those sleeping Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors will also wake up and snatch the Heavenly Forbidden Tree at all costs.

"Brother Ye, I accepted the Heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree, and I really need it. However, you must not tell anyone that you have obtained the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, otherwise even if you say that you have run out, others will not believe it, and even kill you at all costs!" Ouyang Jiu'er reminded.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

After Ouyang Jiu'er put away the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree, he said, "I'll go back and attack the Supreme True Ancestor first, and after I break through, I'll take you to a place!"

Ye Tian didn't know where Ouyang Jiu'er was taking him, but he still responded and nodded.

Ouyang Jiu'er left, and Ye Tian also went back to continue the retreat.

Although progress is starting to slow down now, as long as the retreat is long, the strength will increase rapidly.

......

Tens of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er summoned Ye Tian, and she had broken through to the Supreme True Ancestor's combat power.

In this regard, Ye Tian was not surprised at all.

After all, Ouyang Jiu'er was the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, and it was very easy to cultivate Dao techniques and other secret techniques, and now that he had broken the shackles with the help of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, it was naturally not difficult to promote the combat power of the Supreme True Ancestor.

However, Ouyang Jiu'er was still preparing to retreat for a period of time, and she still had to practice forbidden arts.

So, Ye Tian waited for some more years.

And over the years, his son Ye Xingchen and daughter Ye Xingyue have made great progress, and now they are already the top existences at the elite True Ancestor level, not far from the top True Ancestor.

Xiao Yue and Ye Yu's progress is even more exaggerated, Xiao Yue directly crossed from the strongest true ancestor to the invincible true ancestor's combat power, and Ye Yu became the strongest true ancestor, and he is not weak in the ranks of the strongest true ancestor.

After all, after they mastered the power of the dark forbidden and the forbidden body, their strength would naturally skyrocket, and with the forbidden space, their cultivation speed would speed up a lot.

Therefore, their strength will naturally skyrocket.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er was out of the customs and came to find Ye Tian.

"Brother Ye, let's go!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Jiu'er, where are we going?" Ye Tian asked.

"Go and take one of my former treasure troves, the danger there is nothing to us, and I have already explored it, and it has not been discovered! In addition, there is a treasure there that is very useful to you! If I can successfully take that treasure house, my strength will also improve quickly!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian didn't ask too much, and followed Ouyang Jiu'er to quickly leave the Void Heaven True Country, and after Ouyang Jiu'er performed the Shadowless Divine Step, no one knew their whereabouts.

After a while, they came to a realm debris space.

This is an ownerless Realm Fragment space, because this Realm Fragment is too small, has few resources, and is too remote to be found.

There are not many fragments of the Ownerless Domain Realm like this in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there are countless opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, so no one has the patience to find them slowly.

Swish!

The two of them tore through the void and entered this Domain Realm Fragment Space.

Ye Tian came here and probed, but found nothing.

Obviously, with his current strength, he didn't want to find Ouyang Jiu'er's treasure house, otherwise he would have been found by others a long time ago.

"Open!"

Ouyang Jiu'er shattered the void with one hand and created a passage.

Then, Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er instantly entered it.

As soon as he entered, a monstrous giant hand attacked.

This is a giant ape, and it is a giant ape at the Dao Ancestor level, but at this time, this giant ape is bound by the rule chains of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and its body is in an unknown void, and it is just a hand that sticks out.

"Sure enough, there are still Dao Ancestor-level creatures that haven't died!"

Ouyang Jiu'er was not surprised.

And the strength of this giant ape is not strong, it is only a fivefold Heavenly Dao ancestor, and now if it is forcibly attacked, the combat power it exerts is at most the ultimate combat power of the twofold Heavenly Dao ancestor, and it can exert the strength of the triple heavenly Dao ancestor under the outbreak.

If the Invincible True Ancestor came in, I am afraid it would be very troublesome, but Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er were now Supreme True Ancestors, and it was very simple to suppress this giant ape.

"Frozen!"

Ouyang Jiu'er made a move, and the monstrous giant ape's big hand was directly frozen, spreading all the way to the other party's body.

"Crack!"

As soon as the words fell.

The big hand of the frozen monstrous giant ape shattered into countless pieces, and a scream came from the unknown depths, and there was no sound.

Trample!

The two of them landed from the sky and stepped on the ground.
